---
title: "Rapport: Inkluderende fellesskap for barn og unge"
date: 2018-06-04
categories: ["mobbing", "Psykisk sykdom", "skole"]
description: "[office src=\"https://onedrive.live.com/embed?cid=573222CEFC573D79&resid=573222CEFC573D79%2161132&authkey=AAY98nPL4dalmUg&em=2\"…"
page-layout: article
toc: false
reading-time: true
title-block-banner: false
date-format: "D. MMMM YYYY"
---
:::: {.post-body}
```{=html}
<p>[office src="https://onedrive.live.com/embed?cid=573222CEFC573D79&resid=573222CEFC573D79%2161132&authkey=AAY98nPL4dalmUg&em=2" width="476" height="650"]</p>
```

::::

```{=html}
<div class="post-share">
  <span>Del:</span>
  <a href="https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsstraume97.github.io%2Fhjem%2Fblogg%2Frapport-inkluderende-fellesskap-for-barn-og-unge%2F" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Facebook</a>
  <a href="https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=Rapport%3A%20Inkluderende%20fellesskap%20for%20barn%20og%20unge&url=https%3A%2F%2Fsstraume97.github.io%2Fhjem%2Fblogg%2Frapport-inkluderende-fellesskap-for-barn-og-unge%2F" target="_blank" rel="noopener">X</a>
  <a href="mailto:?subject=Rapport%3A%20Inkluderende%20fellesskap%20for%20barn%20og%20unge&body=https%3A%2F%2Fsstraume97.github.io%2Fhjem%2Fblogg%2Frapport-inkluderende-fellesskap-for-barn-og-unge%2F">E-post</a>
  <button type="button" onclick="navigator.clipboard.writeText('https://sstraume97.github.io/hjem/blogg/rapport-inkluderende-fellesskap-for-barn-og-unge/');this.textContent='Lenke kopiert!'">Kopier lenke</button>
</div>
```
